summary: Completed testing of the AI duplicate check progress system. All new endpoints work correctly: POST /api/questions/check-duplicates-ai-start/{batch_id} returns task_id, GET /api/duplicates/status/{task_id} returns progress (current, total, percentage, status), DELETE /api/duplicates/status/{task_id} cleans up tasks. Frontend shows progress bar with percentage during AI search.
verified_features: GET /api/duplicates/status/{task_id} returns progress fields: current, total, percentage, status, duplicates_found
Progress percentage increases over time during processing
Frontend button shows percentage during search (e.g., '8%', '5%')
Frontend progress bar appears during AI search
Frontend shows 'X encontrados' count during search
Toast notification 'Búsqueda iniciada con GPT-5.2 (OpenAI)...' appears

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Progress bar and percentage display working

context_for_next_testing_agent: The AI duplicate check progress system is fully functional. Backend uses asyncio.create_task for background processing and in-memory dict for task status. Frontend polls every 1.5 seconds using setInterval. The progress shows current/total questions, percentage, and duplicates found count. Model selector allows choosing between GPT-5.2, GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.5, and Gemini 3 Flash.

POST /api/questions/check-duplicates-ai-.notes: Accepts model parameter in request body

frontend_components_tested.AI Search Button: Shows loader icon and percentage during search
frontend_components_tested.Progress Bar: Red bar above question counts, width transitions smoothly
frontend_components_tested.Model Selector: Dropdown with GPT-5.2, GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Gemini 3 Flash
frontend_components_tested.Toast Notifications: Shows search started message with model name
